channel.title: FreelanceTaxCalc - Blog & Guides
channel.description: Expert tax guides, tips, and resources for freelancers and self-employed professionals

item.title: Solo 401(k) vs SEP IRA 2026: Which Retirement Plan is Best?
item.description: Compare Solo 401(k) vs SEP IRA side-by-side with contribution limits, tax savings, and which plan fits your freelance business.

item.title: 1099 vs W-2: Which Is Better After Taxes? 2026 Comparison
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of 1099 contractor and W-2 employee income, taxes, and deductions. See the real difference in take-home pay.

item.title: Top 10 Tax Deductions for DoorDash and Gig Workers 2026
item.description: Complete deduction checklist for gig workers covering mileage, vehicle expenses, equipment, and more. Maximize your refund with these little-known deductions.

item.title: How to Pay Quarterly Taxes as a Freelancer in 2026
item.description: Complete guide to IRS estimated quarterly tax payments for freelancers. Due dates, rates, safe harbor rules, deductions, and how to pay.

item.title: Canada Freelance Tax Guide 2026: Income Tax, CPP & Deductions
item.description: Complete guide to Canadian taxes for freelancers and self-employed in 2026. Federal & provincial rates, CPP contributions, HST/GST, and deductions.

item.title: Quarterly Taxes 2026: Complete Freelancer Guide
item.description: Learn everything about quarterly estimated taxes including due dates, rates, safe harbor rules, deductions, and how to pay the IRS. Essential guide for freelancers.
